g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about CANoe simulation')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Python-CAN simulation')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about CANdb++ and DBC files')
sendPrompt('What is canfd and how does it differ from classic CAN?')
sendPrompt('How does the Linux vcan kernel module work?')
sendPrompt('How does CAN hardware interface via SocketCAN?')
sendPrompt('How do I simulate an ECU on vcan?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a CAN diagnostic tester in software?')
sendPrompt('What is a CAN logger and how does it work?')
sendPrompt('How does a gateway ECU bridge two CAN buses?')
